params.prompt: Vertical portrait photograph for a barbershop brand tile, exact 4:5 aspect ratio, 1080x1350. High-contrast black and white editorial photography, duotone grading with a warm golden-yellow rim/key light used only as an implied light source, never a flat color wash, no straight color photography. Scene: a confident bearded male client seated in a barber chair, eyes closed or looking off-camera, a barber's hand gently combing through his well-groomed beard, tight chair-side crop emphasizing the texture and shape of the beard, moody barbershop interior softly blurred behind, unhurried professional mood, cinematic lighting. Absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark, no graphic overlays, no UI elements anywhere in the image -- pure photography only, a clean background plate.
